content:
AI Engineer World's Fair Coverage

Yesterday, we kicked off our physical newspaper, The Daily Context, at the AI Engineer World’s Fair with "Vector Search." Thank you to everyone who played it online!

Today is Day 2 of the conference, which means Issue #2 of the newspaper is officially out on the floor. For today's puzzle, I wanted to change things up. Say goodbye to the word search grid and hello to...

Context Connections:

Just like yesterday, I built this using AI Studio and deployed it to Cloud Run.

Let me know if you solved the puzzle within four tries!! There are a few tricky ones in there 😈
